title: YTPMV: The Homestar Pants Dance
description:
mp3: Coming soon

Gee, you'd think Homestar found a jar of souls or something.

What's this? 3 years of Youtube Pooping? Preposterous! Thanks to all my subs for making these 3 years fun and awesome. To celebrate, Homestar raps about the length of his trousers. He persuades no one.
